commands: echo '=== Connecting to RDS and querying customers ==='

mysql -h erpnext-poc-erpnextdb-ooorv168mrw1.c2diyosis802.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com -u erpnext -pAtlasLakesAws123! --table -e "USE _5e5899d8398b5f7b; SELECT name AS customer_id, customer_name, customer_type, IFNULL(customer_group,'—') AS customer_group, DATE_FORMAT(creation,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS created_at FROM tabCustomer ORDER BY creation DESC;" 2>/dev/null
echo '=== RDS instance info from inside the DB ==='

mysql -h erpnext-poc-erpnextdb-ooorv168mrw1.c2diyosis802.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com -u erpnext -pAtlasLakesAws123! --table -e "SELECT @@hostname AS rds_hostname, @@version AS version, DATABASE() AS current_db;" 2>/dev/null
